mode_selection_rationale: Pre-flight Operator Directive Discovery found 3 pending directives (DIRECTIVE-006, -007, -008), all priority='medium', all with undefined issued_at. Per dispatcher tie-break sort (priority desc, issued_at desc, alphabetical fallback by readdirSync), DIRECTIVE-006 sorted to the top. Per 'one directive per run' rule, executed DIRECTIVE-006 (analyst-hnote-priority-bump) and authored PROP-043. DIRECTIVE-007 (mark amendment-002 operator-approved — admin lifecycle work) and DIRECTIVE-008 (PROP-042 compression-mode — substantive PROP authoring) are queued for the next two tinker runs.

If creation rate spikes (e.g., from PROP-039 sloppytoppy-score discovering many flagged surfaces, or PROP-041 Phase 2 rewriter generating high-volume), watch for net_velocity_7d turning negative.

directive_handling.lifecycle_compliance: Per DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE additive-edit exception (CLAUDE.md File Ownership Rules). Each new field was absent before this edit (null/undefined); first-set discipline followed. Status was 'pending' before; transitioned to 'completed' per the one-allowed-transition rule.
directive_handling.lifecycle_correction_in_run: Initial edit incorrectly added a new `status_completed` field instead of mutating the existing `status` field. Corrected within the same run: `status` value updated from 'pending' to 'completed', extraneous `status_completed` field removed. Net result is correct lifecycle-compliant state.
